overall.description: A stationary first-person view from a high-rise apartment bedroom in a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis. The camera overlooks a sprawling cityscape with towering glass skyscrapers under clear morning skies. A flying vehicle briefly passes by the large window. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) featuring high-fidelity ray-traced graphics and atmospheric lighting.

entered.detail: unmade bed with white sheets in the immediate foreground
floor-to-ceiling window framing the city view
dark tiled wall with geometric pattern on the left side of the room
modern armchair in the corner near the window
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers visible through the window
distinctive tall cylindrical tower with glass facade on the right side of the view

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a static view from inside a modern high-rise apartment bedroom. An unmade bed sits in the foreground while a large window reveals a sprawling futuristic cityscape with towering glass buildings under clear morning skies. The room features dark tiled walls and modern furniture, bathed in cool natural light.

segments.scene_description: The static view continues as a flying vehicle enters from the left side of the window, moving smoothly across the cityscape view. The car passes in front of the distant skyscrapers and exits to the right, representing the only motion in an otherwise still scene.

segments.scene_description: The scene returns to a completely static state with the flying vehicle gone. The view remains fixed on the futuristic cityscape through the large window, with the unmade bed in the foreground and the tall glass tower dominating the right side of the skyline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective from a high-rise bedroom that captures a brief moment of movement within a sprawling futuristic metropolis. It begins with a still view of a modern room featuring dark tiled walls and an unmade bed, looking out through a large window at towering glass skyscrapers under clear morning skies. As the scene unfolds, a flying vehicle enters from the left and glides smoothly across the skyline, momentarily breaking the stillness as it passes before the distant buildings. The view then returns to a state of complete tranquility once the vehicle exits to the right. Finally, the camera remains fixed on the silent cityscape, with the dominant glass tower on the right framing the quiet morning light.
